div.head: The Minister in the Dominican Republic (Curtis) to the Secretary of State
div.p:
35. Your telegram of May 29, 2 p.m. Stafford, just returned from Santiago, reports President said he had given no orders to clear the region of foreign troops and had no intention of precipitating a conflict with the Haitians. He showed excerpts of note from Haitian Minister
here complaining of persecution by Dominican soldiers in territory always recognized as Haitian territory, and also telegrams from Dominican Chargé d’Affaires at Port-au-Prince stating that the Haitian Government wished to create border incidents in order to distract attention from internal conditions.
Full report by air mail due in Washington Thursday morning.
